description_long: This is a modern two-story stone house with a symmetrical facade, steeply pitched dark gray roofs, and a central glass-covered entryway. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone, complemented by large windows and a prominent chimney on one side. The property is enclosed by a low stone wall and features landscaped gardens with shrubs, trees, and a small greenhouse structure in the backyard. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the backyard offers a patio area with outdoor seating. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story stone house with steep gray roofs, large windows, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, symmetrical facade, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the patio, backyard garden, greenhouse, and large windows.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear garden, patio area, and greenhouse structure.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the chimney, stone wall, and driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass-covered entryway with steps, flanked by stone columns and a small porch
